provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tough black woman in her 30s with cornrow braids and a no-nonsense attitude, wearing a station maintenance jumpsuit in dark grey with a station ID badge, a heavy tool belt with pipe wrenches and sealant applicators, knee pads, mag-lock boots with non-slip soles, a headlamp on an elastic band around her forehead, the jumpsuit is stained with hydraulic fluid and coolant in layers that show years of different spills

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
